---
id: metadata-quality-remediation-diagram
title: Metadata Quality Remediation Workflow Diagram
owner: governance-steward
status: DRAFT
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Metadata Quality Remediation Workflow Diagram

## Visual Flow from Drift Detection to SLA Resolution

---

## Mermaid Diagram

[DIAGRAM-01: Top-down remediation flowchart with a five-way decision branch and a validation loop. Linear top: Drift Detected → Owner Acknowledgment → Metadata Review → a diamond decision box "Type of Drift?". Five arrows fan out from the decision diamond, each labeled by drift type: Structural → "Fix Required Fields"; Referential → "Fix IDs & References"; Ownership → "Update Owner Metadata"; Semantic → "Correct Status/Classification"; Automation → "Escalate to Maintainers". The first four fixes converge into "Local Validation"; the Automation branch goes through its own intermediate "Automation Patch" box and then joins. The convergence point continues: Local Validation → Open Remediation PR → CI Validator. From CI Validator, "Pass" advances to Merge + Resolve → Dashboard Update → Governance Verification → Close SLA (final terminal). "Fail" from CI Validator loops back upward to Metadata Review. Engineering blueprint style, neutral slate background, federal navy (#1F3A5F) for primary spine, teal (#1A9E8F) for the five fix branches, amber (#D4A017) for the decision diamond, red (#C74040) for the failure loop arrow, monospace labels, 16:9 landscape.]

---

## ASCII Diagram

```
Drift --> Acknowledge --> Review --> Classify
         |-> Structural --> Fix fields
         |-> Referential --> Fix IDs/refs
         |-> Ownership --> Update owner
         |-> Semantic --> Correct status
         |-> Automation --> Escalate

Fix --> Validate --> Remediation PR --> CI --> Merge --> Dashboard --> Governance --> Close SLA
```

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
